title: Melicope anisata
taxonomy: Melicope anisata belongs to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus or rue family. This family includes a wide range of plants, many of which are known for their fragrant leaves and flowers. The genus Melicope is native to the Pacific Islands, and Melicope anisata is one of the species found in this region. Melicope anisata is further classified as a flowering plant, specifically a shrub or small tree. Its classification also includes the rank of species, which is the most specific taxonomic level.
